description: Accounting of building expenditures ca. 1230. Fragment of a leaf, of which the bottom left part is missing; it includes three columns of items on both recto and verso. The accounting refers to repairs in Dar Hayyun. Supplies of gypsum, clay, floor tiles, and lime form the majority of the items. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 433 #130)
tags: account, communal, Coptic numerals, waqf, 13th c, qodesh
description_he: חשבון עבודות בנייה, כ-1230. תיקונים בדאר חיון: גבס, חימר, אריחי רצפה וסיד.
